site.tabTitle: Subudhendra Teertha Vidya Samaste (R) - Free Education for Every Child

hero.heading: An institution shaping the leaders of tomorrow.
hero.subtitle: Education for Every Child

about.title: About Our Institution
about.intro: We are dedicated to transforming lives through education.
about.description: Subudhendra Teertha Vidya Samaste (R) is a beacon of hope in Hosaritti, Haveri. We believe that every child, regardless of their background, deserves access to high-quality education. Our English medium school currently caters to students from LKG to 8th standard with free or minimum-fee support for deserving families.
about.description2: Through dedicated educators and community support, we are empowering resilient minds and shaping the leaders of tomorrow. Education is not just about academics; it is about building character, confidence, and a sustainable future for underprivileged families.

quality.title: Quality Education
quality.desc: LKG to 8th standard English medium education.
quality.headline: World-Class English Medium Education
quality.body: Our institution follows a structured, CBSE-aligned curriculum delivered entirely in English from LKG all the way through 8th standard. Students receive access to state-of-the-art textbooks, digital learning materials, and a modern classroom environment that rivals private schools.
points: CBSE-aligned English-medium curriculum
Structured learning from LKG to 8th Standard
Textbooks, notebooks and stationery support
Regular assessments and parent-teacher meetings
Digital learning support and library access

affordable.title: Free or Minimum Fees
affordable.desc: Accessible education support for underprivileged children.
affordable.headline: Affordable Access, Fewer Barriers
affordable.body: We believe financial hardship should never become a barrier to education. Subudhendra Teertha Vidya Samaste (R) keeps schooling free or at minimum fees for deserving children, while continuing to support essentials like learning materials and student welfare.
points: Free or minimum-fee admission support for deserving families
Uniform and learning support based on student needs
Help with school bags, books, and stationery
Student welfare support to reduce financial pressure
A commitment to keeping education affordable and accessible

teachers.title: Expert Teachers
teachers.headline: Passionate, Qualified Educators
teachers.body: Our teaching staff is carefully selected for both their academic qualifications and their genuine passion for uplifting underprivileged children. They undergo regular training to stay current with the best educational practices.
points: All teachers hold recognized degrees (B.Ed / D.Ed)
Ongoing professional development and workshops
Low student-to-teacher ratio for personalized attention
Specialist teachers for Art, Music, and Physical Education
Commitment to child welfare and emotional well-being

holistic.title: Holistic Growth
holistic.desc: Focusing on character and academics alike.
holistic.headline: Beyond Academics, Building Character
holistic.body: True education shapes the whole person. Our programs go beyond textbooks to nurture moral values, self-confidence, creativity, and teamwork, preparing students not just for exams, but for life itself.
points: Weekly moral science and values classes
Annual sports day, cultural events, and competitions
Yoga, meditation, and mindfulness sessions
Public speaking and leadership workshops
Community service projects for social awareness

footer.title: Subudhendra Teertha Vidya Samaste (R)
footer.description: A non-profit charitable trust providing free quality English-medium education, books, and uniforms to underprivileged children — LKG to 8th standard.
footer.registered: Registered under Section 12A • 80G Certified • CSR Eligible

blogs.title: Blog/News
blogs.subtitle: Latest Updates & Stories from Our Community
blogs.pageSubtitle: Explore our latest updates, success stories of our students, and the impact our community is making across villages.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Moments from Our School Life
gallery.teaserSubtitle: Candid moments, milestones, and community impact captured as they happened.

donate.title: Support Us - Donate Today
donate.subtitle: Your contribution directly impacts children's futures
donate.successDefault: Your generous donation has been recorded. We will contact you shortly with the receipt and further details.
donate.securePayment: Secure payment powered by Razorpay. Your information is safe.
donate.upiHelp1: If UPI is not showing inside Razorpay checkout, donors can scan this QR code using any UPI app and pay directly to the trust account.
donate.upiHelp2: After payment, enter the UPI transaction reference below. The donation will be stored in the backend as pending verification, and the admin can verify it before the receipt is emailed.
donate.scannerFormNoticeText: If you paid through the scanner, filling this form is compulsory to inform the trust owner about your donation and to receive your receipt.
donate.taxNotice: All donations are tax-deductible under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act. The institution is also registered under Section 12A and is eligible for CSR contributions.

impactPoints.books: ₹1,000 sponsors a child's books & stationery for a term
impactPoints.uniforms: ₹2,500 covers uniforms and shoes for a year
impactPoints.directToChildren: 100% of your donation goes directly to the children

errors.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount (minimum INR 100)

founder.title: Meet Our Founder
founder.name: Dr. Siddalingesh Ankalkoti
founder.quote: True education is not a privilege for the few, but a fundamental right for all. When we empower a child with knowledge, we do not just change one life, we uplift an entire generation. Subudhendra Teertha Vidya Samaste is my commitment to this belief.
founder.paragraph1: Driven by a profound passion for societal progress, Dr. Siddalingesh Ankalkoti established this institution with a singular, unwavering focus: to break the cycle of poverty through high-quality, English-medium education.
founder.paragraph2: His visionary leadership continues to guide the Trust in its mission to bring world-class educational opportunities to the most disadvantaged communities in Haveri district, transforming raw potential into future leaders.
achievements: National Award for Excellence in Social Service (2022)
Recognized by nine trustees for his community service and awarded state-level honors
